```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?countryLabel ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?cup rdfs:label ?cupLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?cupLabel) , "fifa world cup"))
  .
  ?cup wdt:P1346 ?winner ; wdt:P17 ?country ; wdt:P582 ?endDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel
    FILTER(lang(?countryLabel) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel
    FILTER(lang(?winnerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?endDate)
LIMIT 1
```
